combinations.title: Proceed with speed from this signal
combinations.meaningTemplate: Proceed. Do not exceed {speedKph} km/h from this signal through the following points and crossings area.
playerActionTemplate: Read the white numeral as {speedKph} km/h.
Reduce speed before the signal if necessary.
Proceed while observing any lower applicable limit.

combinations.title: Proceed and expect a lower indicated speed
combinations.meaningTemplate: Proceed. Expect {speedKph} km/h at the associated following Zs 3.
playerActionTemplate: Read the yellow numeral as {speedKph} km/h.
Begin braking so the announced speed is reached at the required point.
Acknowledge PZB if the associated 1000 Hz influence is active.

combinations.title: Proceed at restricted speed and expect stop
combinations.meaningTemplate: Proceed at no more than {speedKph} km/h from this signal and expect the next main signal to show stop.
playerActionTemplate: Acknowledge PZB if the warning influence is active.
Approach the next main signal prepared to stop.

combinations.title: Restricted speed, expect stop, and speed announcement
combinations.meaningTemplate: Proceed at no more than {currentSpeedKph} km/h, expect stop at the next main signal, and observe the separately announced {nextSpeedKph} km/h where its Zs 3 applies.
notes: This record models the data relationship. Actual permitted combinations and TSW occurrences require route evidence.
